billingconductor.pricingrule.CfnAbout: Creates a pricing rule which can be associated with a pricing plan, or a set of pricing plans.

billingconductor.pricingrule.BillingEnti.Description: The seller of services provided by AWS, their affiliates, or third-party providers selling services via AWS Marketplace.

billingconductor.pricingrule.ModifierPer.Description: A percentage modifier applied on the public pricing rates.

billingconductor.pricingrule.Name.Description: The name of a pricing rule.

billingconductor.pricingrule.Operation.Description: Operation is the specific AWS action covered by this line item. This describes the specific usage of the line item.   If the `Scope` attribute is set to `SKU`, this attribute indicates which operation the `PricingRule` is modifying. For example, a value of `RunInstances:0202` indicates the operation of running an Amazon EC2 instance.

billingconductor.pricingrule.Scope.Description: The scope of pricing rule that indicates if it's globally applicable or service-specific.

billingconductor.pricingrule.Service.Description: If the `Scope` attribute is `SERVICE`, this attribute indicates which service the `PricingRule` is applicable for.

billingconductor.pricingrule.Tags.Description: A map that contains tag keys and tag values that are attached to a pricing rule.

billingconductor.pricingrule.Tiering.Description: The set of tiering configurations for the pricing rule.

billingconductor.pricingrule.UsageType.Description: Usage Type is the unit that each service uses to measure the usage of a specific type of resource.
